title: Rate Build-Up
description: Build a unit rate from material, labour, plant, overhead and profit.

steps.title: Material, labour, plant
steps.voiceScript: Enter the material, labour and plant that make up the rate.
steps.captionText: Enter the material, labour and plant that make up the rate.
steps.fallbackMessage: Material, labour, plant: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Overhead and profit
steps.description: Markup is applied on top, never inside, the cost.
steps.voiceScript: Overhead and profit are applied as markup on top of the cost.
steps.captionText: Overhead and profit are applied as markup on top of the cost.
steps.fallbackMessage: Overhead and profit: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Compute
steps.description: The compound rate flows into every BOQ line that uses it.
steps.voiceScript: The computed rate flows into every bill of quantities line that uses it.
steps.captionText: The computed rate flows into every bill of quantities line that uses it.
steps.fallbackMessage: Compute: not visible on this screen yet.
